claim_boundary: Tier 7.0c is software repair-candidate evidence only. It tests a bounded online continuous readout/interface over causal CRA state after Tier 7.0b localized the gap. It is not hardware evidence, not a new baseline freeze, not an unconstrained supervised model, and not a final superiority claim.

no_future_leakage: all repairs consume only current/past features
feature normalization uses train prefix only
online updates occur after each prediction
no model fits on held-out test rows in batch
nonclaims: not proof of superiority until promotion/regression
fairness_contract.readout_update: prediction before update; online normalized LMS; no batch test fit
fairness_contract.tier: Tier 7.0c - Bounded Continuous Readout / Interface Repair

key_metrics.recommendation: Do not promote yet; design a stricter state-specific repair or accept this benchmark mostly measures lag regression.

repair_classification.recommendation: Do not promote yet; design a stricter state-specific repair or accept this benchmark mostly measures lag regression.
